steps.title: Identify the triangle angle-sum relationship
steps.content:
The triangle has a right angle ($90°$), an angle of $24°$, and the unknown angle $a$. The three interior angles of any triangle sum to $180°$:
$$90° + 24° + a = 180°$$

steps.title: Solve for the missing angle
steps.content:
Solve for $a$:
$$a = 180° - 90° - 24° = 66°$$That matches choice B — B is correct.
